factors: I was slightly confused. The instructions only stated the wizards decides to add an apple to the left or right basket or do nothing. The farmer was able to move freely before the wizards decision so in my opinion the wizard had nothing to do with the farmer moving between baskets. However, by the last few questions I was confused because although the farmer was able to move freely, the wizard did cause the farmer to end up at the right basket. I just found it a little confusing.
